Release draft: v1.0.3
=====================

Title: Tracker v1.0.3

Tag: v1.0.3

Description:
Initial packaged release of the Tracker plugin for GameHelper.

Highlights:
- Отслеживание эффектов статуса (`StatusEffectLogic`).
- Визуализация Ground Effects (`GroundEffectLogic`).
- Линии/маркировка монстров (`MonsterLineLogic`).

Suggested assets to attach:
- `Tracker/bin/Debug/net8.0/` content as a zip (plugin binaries and `status_icons.png`).

How to publish on GitHub:
1. Create a new Release on GitHub, set the tag to `v1.0.3` and paste this description.
2. Upload the compiled binary ZIP from `Tracker/bin/Debug/net8.0/`.
